utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Listen , I know you wanted to talk to me , but I have an idea that may make you want to stay married . We register , and you get to keep all the presents !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Listen , look I thought a lot about how to tell you this and the bottom line , Ross , is we can not stay married .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh Ross , come on ! This is not , this is not a marriage ! ! This is the world worst hangover ! Ross , listen , if you do not get this annulment , I will !
